titlestmt.titleproper: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections records13-6-2691
titlestmt.author: Compiled by J. Parker

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-07 18:02:27 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Library. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Records, guest books, video tour, card files, financial records, and correspondence.
did.abstract: Records, files, and miscellany relating to the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Julia ParkerPeter Martinez, July 2003Ariel J. Conant, September 2006

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Division was formed in 1992 with the combination of the Department of Rare Books, the Department of Manuscripts and University Archives, the History of Science Collections, and the Icelandic Collection.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Library Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections records, #13-6-2691. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Administrative records; financial records; reference and donor correspondence, and chronological file of outgoing correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Memorabilia includes book truck labels fancifully annotated by student employees during the transfer of collections from Olin Library to Kroch Library and guest books signed by early visitors and patrons, August through November, 1992. Video tour of the Division created by Nancy Dean. T-shirt and tote bag from the 1996 RBMS Preconference (for the Rare Books and Manuscripts Section of the Association of College and Research Libraries), held at Cornell.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Records of the Division's Strategic Plan, 1993-94.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Icelandic Collection circulation and other card files.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Records compiled by Cheryl Stadel-Bevans, 1998-1999 for an 18-month NHPRC (National Historical Publications and Records Commission) -sponsored project to investigate the requirements for electronic administrative records at Cornell, and a report by Nancy McGovern on electronic student records systems, 2000.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Files relating to the John Nolen Research Fund, 1990-2001.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Videotape of the dedication of the Hirshland Exhibition Gallery, November 13, 2002. Audio tape of New York State canal talk by Prof. Donald Postle, 1995. Also, Cornell family genealogical notes.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.p: Cataloging projects, cataloging information, technical services information, public services miscellany, food exhibit [2002]
